name: Fiery Fervor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>燃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>える<ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>志</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip this card to that target. If your opponent controls a monster with ATK higher than that same monster's original ATK, the ATK of the equipped monster becomes double the equipped monster's original ATK, during the Damage Step only.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip this card to that target. If your opponent controls a monster with ATK higher than that same monster's original ATK, the ATK of the equipped monster becomes double the equipped monster's original ATK, during the Damage Step only.
